title: Void Dash: Space Jump Game
shortDescription: Tap, jump and dodge obstacles across five planets in a fast offline arcade game.
fullDescription:
Jump into Void Dash, a fast one-tap space arcade game built around timing, reflexes and high-score chasing.

Tap to jump, dodge incoming barriers and survive as the speed increases. Every run starts simple, then becomes a tougher test of focus as obstacle patterns grow faster and more dangerous.

EXPLORE FIVE COSMIC WORLDS
Travel through five distinct space environments, each with its own visual identity and rising difficulty:

• Earth Orbit
• Mars Dust
• Europa Ice
• Titan Fog
• The Void

SIMPLE TO PLAY, HARD TO MASTER
Void Dash uses easy one-tap controls, but surviving takes precise timing. Learn each obstacle pattern, react quickly and push farther with every attempt.

FEATURES
• Fast one-tap arcade gameplay
• Endless jump-and-dodge challenge
• Five unique planetary zones
• Increasing difficulty every 10 points
• Faster barriers and double-obstacle patterns
• High-score tracking
• Smooth, responsive controls
• Quick sessions for playing anywhere
• Fully playable offline
• No ads
• No in-app purchases
• No accounts or sign-ups
• Lightweight and fast

PLAY WITHOUT INTERRUPTIONS
There are no advertisements, microtransactions, paywalls or online requirements. Open the game and start playing immediately.

Perfect for players who enjoy space games, endless arcade games, reflex challenges, one-tap games and chasing a new personal best.

How far can you travel before the cosmos catches up with you?

Tap. Jump. Dodge. Survive.
